name: GitHub Repo Scanner
description: Clones a GitHub repository (URL or owner/name) and scans the whole tree for IaC/DevOps misconfigurations and hardcoded secrets, with redaction and severity scoring.
author: NisargHunter AI core

repo.description: GitHub URL, owner/name, or local path

permissions.reason: Clones the target repository over HTTPS from github.com.
Only scan repositories that are in the engagement's declared scope.
